code_dossier.name: RegisterResponse.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing the response structure for user registration operations in the account management system. It extends BaseResponse to inherit standard response fields like code and message.

data.detailed_description:
RegisterResponse is a minimalistic Data Transfer Object (DTO) class that serves as the response wrapper for user registration API endpoints in the account management system. 

The class extends BaseResponse, inheriting two key fields:
1. `code` - A ToBCodeEnum representing the operation result status code
2. `message` - A String containing the descriptive message for the response

Currently, RegisterResponse is an empty subclass that relies entirely on its parent class for functionality. This design pattern is commonly used in Java applications to:
- Provide type-specific response handling for different API operations
- Allow future extensibility for registration-specific response data
- Enable polymorphic processing of different response types in the API layer

The class is positioned in the DTO layer (`com.zixin.accountapi.dto` package), following standard layered architecture conventions. It uses Lombok annotations (inherited via @Data on BaseResponse) for automatic getter/setter generation, reducing boilerplate code.

While the current implementation is empty, the class establishes a clear contract for registration responses and provides a dedicated type that can be extended with registration-specific fields (such as user ID, registration timestamp, or verification requirements) as the business requirements evolve.
responsibilities: Encapsulate registration operation response data for API communication
Provide type-safe response structure specific to registration functionality
Inherit and utilize standard response fields (code, message) from BaseResponse
Enable future extensibility for registration-specific response attributes
Maintain separation of concerns by isolating registration response structure from other DTOs

interfaces.name: RegisterResponse
interfaces.description: DTO class for registration API responses, extending BaseResponse to inherit code and message fields with Lombok-generated accessors
